sans.$value: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
sans.$description: Primary UI font — Geist (Vercel, OFL). Single sans across display + body + UI per v1.1.

mono.$value: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
mono.$description: Mono — Geist Mono. Used for eyebrow labels, citation IDs, breadcrumbs, mono metadata. Charts subsystem retains JetBrains Mono fallback for tabular numerals.

display.$description: v2 — Display family for marketing-candy register only. Single weight (400, the only weight Bagel Fat One ships). OFL. Never below 32px, never in app interior, never in body copy.

body.$value: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif
body.$description: v2 — Body + UI family across both registers. Variable, weights 200–800, we use 400/500/600/700. OFL.

accent.$description: v2 — Handwritten accent. Marketing micro-moments only — annotations beside chart screenshots, pull-out callouts. Max two instances per marketing page. OFL.

display-lg.$description: Page titles, marketing hero, KPI values

body-sm.$description: Default body in v1.1, chat bubble body

eyebrow.$description: Mono eyebrow labels (PROVEDO REPLIES, eyebrow-mono) — paired with letterSpacing.eyebrow.

display-xxl.$description: v2 — Bagel Fat One hero H1, marketing only. line-height 0.95, tracking -0.02em.

display-v2-xl.$description: v2 — Bagel Fat One section heroes, marketing only. line-height 1.0, tracking -0.015em.

display-v2-lg.$description: v2 — Bagel Fat One pricing tier titles, comparison column heads. line-height 1.05, tracking -0.01em.

display-v2-md.$description: v2 — Bagel Fat One card hero titles in marketing. line-height 1.1.

display-v2-sm.$description: v2 — Bagel Fat One lower-emphasis decorative heads. Floor for Bagel — never below 32px.

heading-v2-xl.$description: v2 — Manrope app page titles, marketing sub-heads where Bagel feels too loud. weight 700, lh 1.2.

heading-v2-lg.$description: v2 — Manrope card titles, section heads. weight 600, lh 1.25.

bold.$description: Reserved for emphasis-within-headline only — never paired with color shift (brand lock §13.4).

eyebrow.$description: stage / sig / insight / modal eyebrow — mono uppercase
